description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 92% polyester and 8% spandex with a 100% polyester mesh which is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has short raglan sleeves and nike swoosh printed on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned for that absolute running experience, this nike jersey is replete with Dri-Fit comfort to make your sporting experience all the more comfortable and fun. The Dri-Fit technology wicks away sweat, allowing you to concentrate on your running, while the mesh panels enhance ventilation and regulate body temperature. Team this with performance shorts and running shoes for that complete workout.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of chest 33”
